title: OutcomeLabelV1
description: One realized-outcome row attached to a historical pitch (prompt 43). Joins to historical_pitch.v1 on pitch_id. Provenance is REQUIRED — no unsourced labels are accepted. Each row records: 5-year survival, exit event, last-known ARR / headcount, the as-of date, and a strict provenance object naming the source, URL, retrieval timestamp, and retriever identity. Multiple rows per pitch_id are allowed; the export keeps the row with the latest outcome_as_of.

survival_5yr.description: Was the company still operating five years after pitch_year? Use boolean true/false for sourced labels and string 'unknown' when the data is genuinely missing — never default to true/false on missing data.

exit_event.description: Realized exit event as of outcome_as_of. acquired|ipo|shutdown require minimum two-source corroboration (see docs/specs/outcome_labeling.md). 'active' = still operating with no exit event. 'unknown' = genuinely missing data; rows with 'unknown' are excluded from the default study export.

last_known_arr_usd.description: Last-known annualized recurring revenue in USD; null when not disclosed.

last_known_headcount.description: Last-known full-time-equivalent headcount; null when not disclosed.

outcome_as_of.description: ISO-8601 calendar date (YYYY-MM-DD) on which this label is asserted to be true.

outcome_provenance.description: Strict provenance — every field is required. Unsourced labels are rejected.

url.description: Canonical URL of the source document; must parse with urllib.parse.urlparse and have a scheme + netloc.

retrieved_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the source was retrieved.

retrieved_by.description: Identity (operator handle or service account) responsible for the retrieval.
